name: @motia/perdu
description: Perdu (Persist & Durable) integration for Motia - Self-contained durability layer

scripts.reset-services: docker-compose -f docker-compose.perdu.yml down --volumes && docker-compose -f docker-compose.perdu.yml up -d
scripts.psql-state: docker exec -it motia-perdu-postgres psql -U motia -d motia_perdu
scripts.psql-events: docker exec -it motia-perdu-postgres psql -U motia -d motia_perdu
scripts.psql-execution: docker exec -it motia-perdu-postgres psql -U motia -d motia_perdu
